youtube_id: TBD — upload pending; video ready at out-spinner-r12/spinner-wheel-r12-final.mp4

pronunciation_map.Present (verb /prəˈzent/): PHONETIC RESPELLING in tts_text: 'prih-ZENT' forces ElevenLabs to stress the second syllable (verb form). Context cueing alone was unreliable (failed r8-r13). IPA /prɪˈzɛnt/. display_text kept natural.

youtube_chapters:
0:00 Create and set up a Spinner Wheel slide
0:22 Add entries and preview the spin
0:40 Go live and reveal the winner
youtube_chapters_notes: 3 chapters, 52.73s total, r12 — correct branded outro (splash_intro_BD.webm, animated AhaSlides splash, has opus audio); VO body identical to r11 (all 7 clips present)
notes: AKB-15 r14 — PRONUNCIATION FIX: sw-present clip re-rendered with phonetic respelling 'prih-ZENT' in tts_text to force verb stress (IPA /prɪˈzɛnt/). Context cueing ('Hit Present to go live') was unreliable across r8-r13; the explicit respelling is the reliable override per kb-video-voiceover skill spec. Only sw-present was re-rendered (all other 6 clips byte-identical from r11). Re-mixed by muting old sw-present window (40.5-48.81s) in r11 narrated audio and overlaying new clip. Energy scan confirms speech at 40.57-48.55s. Outro = splash_intro_BD.webm (2.61s, vp9, opus stereo). Final: out-videos/out-spinner-r14/spinner-wheel-r14-final.mp4 (52.73s). Not on YouTube (no creds + channel cap). Article embed unchanged.

steps.display_text: Want to pick a random participant? Share your QR code — everyone who joins gets spun for automatically.
steps.tts_text: Want to pick a random participant? Share your QR code — everyone who joins gets spun for automatically.

steps.display_text: Select Spinner Wheel from the slide type picker in the Quiz section.
steps.tts_text: Select Spinner Wheel from the slide type picker in the Quiz section.

steps.display_text: Check Participant name autofill in the right panel — participants scan your QR code and enter their name to join, and the wheel fills itself automatically.
steps.tts_text: Tick Participant name autofill in the right panel — scan QR, enter name to join, and the wheel fills itself.

steps.display_text: Or prefer a fixed list? Type entries one per line in the Entries field, or paste a whole list at once.
steps.tts_text: Or prefer a fixed list? Type entries one per line, or paste a whole list at once.

steps.display_text: Click Save — each entry appears as a coloured segment on the wheel.
steps.tts_text: Click Save — each entry appears as a coloured segment on the wheel.

steps.display_text: Click the play button at the centre of the wheel to preview the spin — it lands on a winner!
steps.tts_text: Click the play button at the centre of the wheel to preview the spin — it lands on a winner!

steps.display_text: Hit Present to go live — then press the centre of the wheel to spin for your audience. The winner appears on every screen at once!
steps.tts_text: Hit prih-ZENT to go live — then press the centre of the wheel to spin for your audience. The winner appears on every screen at once!

mix_command: r14 pronunciation fix — mute old sw-present window + overlay new clip, then concat outro: FFMPEG=$(node -p "require('ffmpeg-static')") && $FFMPEG -y -i out-videos/out-spinner-r11/spinner-wheel-r11-narrated.webm -i out-videos/out-spinner-r14/sw-present-r14.mp3 -filter_complex '[0:a]volume=enable=between(t\,40.5\,48.81):volume=0[a_muted];[1:a]adelay=40500|40500[a_new];[a_muted][a_new]amix=inputs=2:normalize=0[aout]' -map 0:v -map '[aout]' -c:v copy -c:a libopus -b:a 64k out-videos/out-spinner-r14/spinner-wheel-r14-narrated.webm && OUTRO="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude/skills/kb-tutorial-video/assets/splash_intro_BD.webm" && $FFMPEG -y -i out-videos/out-spinner-r14/spinner-wheel-r14-narrated.webm -i $OUTRO -filter_complex '[0:v][0:a][1:v][1:a]concat=n=2:v=1:a=1[vout][aout]' -map '[vout]' -map '[aout]' -c:v libx264 -crf 20 -preset medium -c:a aac -ar 48000 -ac 1 out-videos/out-spinner-r14/spinner-wheel-r14-final.mp4
